name: Team Rand
subject: #100DaysToVictory starts today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Supporter,

Today marks 100 days until the Iowa caucuses,
and to celebrate, we are launching a massive grassroots push
nationwide.

We need your help!

Every day for the next 10 days, Team Rand is
organizing door-knocking and phone-banking in all 50 states.

The mainstream media -- desperate to push
party establishment picks and turn this campaign into a TV
reality show -- wants nothing more than to blackout our message
of liberty.

That's why it's important that WE spread our
positive message of liberty, freedom, and prosperity across the
nation.

Supporter, can we count on you to join this
massive effort? Visit our website to RSVP for the
#100DaysToVictory Initiative.

Rand's plan for America includes:

A 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax that eliminates
corporate welfare;
Balancing the budget in 5 years - I have
identified specific cuts to spending;
Term limits to get rid of the career
politicians;
Requiring Congress to Read the Bills
before voting on them;
Making Congress live by the laws they
pass;
Following Ronald Reagan's doctrine of
"peace through strength," which ensures that America has a
military that is second to none, but does not use it for
unnecessary foreign intervention.

Our campaign isn't backed by the Washington
insiders or Wall Street elite, it is fueled by everyday folks
like yourself.

Your participation is crucial to our success!
Please RSVP at randpaul.com/100days and a member from my team
will be in touch shortly.

Thank you for your steadfast support.

In Liberty,

Team Rand

PS: If you can't help out with the
#100DaysToVictory Initiative, will you make a contribution today?

Your generous donation will help us supply
our volunteers with the vital tools needed in the field to spread
our message of liberty and limited government. Click here to make
your secure contribution of $250, $100, $50, $35 or any amount
that you can afford today.

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isC_beUmNh

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osC_beUmNh

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter 10/24
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Rand Paul For President
body:
| | |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31200924:Wsi4jOm4N:m:1:879035888:AED3C3944D19792D98E32F9813C3DD23:r)
---
| |
---
**Saturday, October 24, 2015**

This week, Senator Paul and our campaign saw success both on and off the campaign trail. Not only was Rand met with energized crowds in both Iowa and New Hampshire, but two new polls showed Sen. Paul's message is resonating with more and more voters across the nation. A national CNN polls has Rand at a strong position ahead of Ted Cruz, Carly Fiorina, and John Kasich, while an Iowa Quinnipiac poll shows Rand competitive in the top five ahead of both Jeb Bush and Carly Fiorina.

To help us capitalize on this momentum, our campaign is excited to have launched our #100DaysToVictory initiative encouraging supporters to participate in phone-banking and door-knocking in their community. You can sign-up to get involved in #100DaysToVictory from any state in the Union by visiting: [www.randpaul.com/100days](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31200925:Wsi4jOm4N:m:1:879035888:AED3C3944D19792D98E32F9813C3DD23:r) .

This coming week, Rand will be visiting Nevada for a campaign office opening in Las Vegas before he heads to Boulder, Colorado for the CNBC Republican Debate! Be sure to tune in and Tweet your favorite moment and support by using #StandWithRand.

Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist
Rand Paul for President
| | |
## News of the Week
---
| | |
### New Hampshire Endorsements Total 325 for Rand Paul for President
WASHINGTON, D.C. - "Liberty-loving grassroots activists continue to gravitate to Rand Paul's message of term-limits, balanced budgets and protecting the entire Bill of Rights. These 25 supporters join the 300 members of the Paul Campaign New Hampshire Leadership Team to strengthen our statewide volunteer-driven organization. Rand Paul is dedicated to building the ground game to capture his growing momentum and turn out voters who want to rein in the Washington Machine," says Michael Biundo, Senior Advisor to Rand Paul for President.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31200926:Wsi4jOm4N:m:1:879035888:AED3C3944D19792D98E32F9813C3DD23:r)
---
|
### Rand Paul For President: 100 Days To Victory
WASHINGTON, D.C. - This week, Rand Paul for President is launching the '100 Days to Victory' initiative and calling supporters to action with a 10 day grassroots push. This Saturday marks the 100 day countdown to the Iowa Caucuses and the 108 day countdown to the First in the Nation Primary in New Hampshire. Rand Paul for President will be coordinating with grassroots activists in all 50 states and the calls to action will include door-knocking, phone-from-home programs, phone banking, supporting Rand Paul on social media, and hosting debate watch parties.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31200927:Wsi4jOm4N:m:1:879035888:AED3C3944D19792D98E32F9813C3DD23:r)
---
|
### Paul On CNN Poll Rise: 'It's Just Part Of My Movement Upwards'
"We've seen movement upwards ever since the second debate in our fundraising and our organizational ability and now we're seeing a bit of it in this poll," Paul told The Washington Examiner Tuesday. He noted that most polls have "underappreciated" his support among independent voters and youth.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31200928:Wsi4jOm4N:m:1:879035888:AED3C3944D19792D98E32F9813C3DD23:r)
---
| |
---
|

Want to be in our next endorsement video? [Click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31200925:Wsi4jOm4N:m:1:879035888:AED3C3944D19792D98E32F9813C3DD23:r) to tell us why you Stand with Rand!

### Rand Paul Las Vegas Office Opening
Come and meet Senator Rand Paul at the Las Vegas office opening on Monday morning, October 26th.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31200930:Wsi4jOm4N:m:1:879035888:AED3C3944D19792D98E32F9813C3DD23:r)
---
|
|
## Volunteer of the Week
---
| |
### Steve Hoffman
#### South Carolina
Steve Hoffman has been one of our most oustanding volunteers in South Carolina. Steve and the Horry County Rand team purchased a booth at the Loris Bog-Off Festival in Myrtle Beach and signed up dozens of new volunteers and voters.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31200931:Wsi4jOm4N:m:1:879035888:AED3C3944D19792D98E32F9813C3DD23:r)

name: Bill Clinton
subject: Is your name on Hillary’s birthday card?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
I hope you'll do this for Hillary. | Friend --

Hillary’s birthday is on Monday, and it would mean a lot to her to hear from supporters like you.

**Add your name, and wish Hillary a happy birthday:**

| [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM4MjkyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNDc0NzczS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM4MjkyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNDc0NzczS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Bill

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM4MjkyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNDc0NzczS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM4MjkyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNDc0NzczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM4MjkyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNDc0NzczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM4MjkyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNDc0NzczS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM4MjkyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNDc0NzczS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM4MjkyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNDc0NzczS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM4MjkyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNDc0NzczS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Murphy
subject: look, this is your call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| "Murphy, who's running for Senate, **brought in double what any of his rivals, Democrat or Republican, did in the third quarter** "
\-- _Politico_ , 10/21/2015 Friends,

Patrick's beating all of his opponents in the polls. Turns out, he's beating them in the money race, too.

**All the tea leaves agree -- if we want to turn Florida blue, Patrick is the best choice.**

This is great news. And we should be proud of the accomplishment. But friend -- in an extremely competitive race like this, momentum doesn't stay in one place for too long.

**We don 't get to take a break.** **It 's our job to keep the momentum growing -- and that means we need supporters like you to step up.**

[**That 's why we set an October goal of $35,000. Can you help us out with a contribution?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae216a/738133e4/3a7e6019/7f832572/336383359/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151023nd?refcode=pme151023_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

You don't need to read tea leaves to know that Patrick is the right person for this job. It's not easy to get things done in Congress -- especially with the Tea Party gaining power. But Patrick does it.

Now, we could sit back and celebrate this victory. We could kick back and say we've done enough. But then we'd watch Patrick lose next November.

Or we can do what we need to do -- **keep up this level of support, keep the momentum with us, and celebrate an even bigger victory next November.**

Your call.

[**Help us keep up the momentum we need to propel Patrick to victory. Contribute $5 or more right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae216a/738133e4/3a7e6019/7f832572/336383359/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151023nd?refcode=pme151023_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thanks

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae216a/738133e4/3a7e6019/7f832573/336383359/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

name: David Plouffe
subject: I never thought I’d write this email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
We need to step up for Hillary. | Friend --

During the most intense days of the 2008 primary, while I was serving as the Obama campaign manager, I would never have imagined writing this email.

But eight years later, I believe Hillary Clinton should -- and will -- be our next president. She will make an outstanding and worthy successor to President Obama. She will do big and important things -- and we will all look back and be proud of whatever we did to help elect her.

**[Be a part of this by chipping in $1 right now.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjM4Mjk3NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTA3Njk2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Here’s what I (and so many fellow Obama campaign veterans) have learned about Hillary Clinton:

She doesn’t quit -- and there were times I wish she had! But you have to deeply admire that strength and persistence. From her job at the Children’s Defense Fund to her work as First Lady of the United States, as a U.S. Senator for New York, and as the Secretary of State, she’s been working everyday to make people’s lives better.

You won’t find anyone in this race more determined than Hillary to make sure every single American has a fair shot to live up to their potential. There is no one more prepared, more diligent, or more ready with detailed plans for how to make it happen.

Hillary will protect President Obama’s legacy -- and like President Obama before her, she will make history. I look forward to the day my daughter, who was born a little more than 48 hours after the glorious scene in Grant Park in 2008, will know just as well as my son that she can grow up to be anything she wants, even president of the United States.

The stakes in this election are enormous. The difference between Hillary and a Trump, Carson, or Rubio could not be more profound. Once again, we need a president who understands the challenges we face -- someone who can and will do something about it.

**Hillary Clinton is that leader. And if we step up to fight alongside her, she’ll be the next president of the United States. Chip in $1 to help make it happen:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM4Mjk3NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTA3Njk2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM4Mjk3NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTA3Njk2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Go win this thing, Madam Secretary.

Sincerely,

David Plouffe

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjM4Mjk3NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTA3Njk2S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA

This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjM4Mjk3NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTA3Njk2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM4Mjk3NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTA3Njk2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. clean_body: We need to step up for Hillary. | Friend -- During the most intense days of the 2008 primary, while I was serving as the Obama campaign manager, I would never have imagined writing this email. But eight years later, I believe Hillary Clinton should -- and will -- be our next president. She will make an outstanding and worthy successor to President Obama. She will do big and important things -- and we will all look back and be proud of whatever we did to help elect her. Here’s what I (and so many fellow Obama campaign veterans) have learned about Hillary Clinton: She doesn’t quit -- and there were times I wish she had! But you have to deeply admire that strength and persistence. From her job at the Children’s Defense Fund to her work as First Lady of the United States, as a U.S. Senator for New York, and as the Secretary of State, she’s been working everyday to make people’s lives better. You won’t find anyone in this race more determined than Hillary to make sure every single American has a fair shot to live up to their potential. There is no one more prepared, more diligent, or more ready with detailed plans for how to make it happen. Hillary will protect President Obama’s legacy -- and like President Obama before her, she will make history. I look forward to the day my daughter, who was born a little more than 48 hours after the glorious scene in Grant Park in 2008, will know just as well as my son that she can grow up to be anything she wants, even president of the United States. The stakes in this election are enormous. The difference between Hillary and a Trump, Carson, or Rubio could not be more profound. Once again, we need a president who understands the challenges we face -- someone who can and will do something about it. Hillary Clinton is that leader. And if we step up to fight alongside her, she’ll be the next president of the United States. Chip in $1 to help make it happen: | --- ]() Go win this thing, Madam Secretary. Sincerely, David Plouffe Did someone forward this email to you? | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
